name: process_blob_event_successful_pdf_extraction
description: Validates the end-to-end workflow of FSRAgent.process_blob_event for a valid PDF blob event, ensuring extraction, canonicalization, confidence validation, routing, output writing, and downstream notification all succeed.
input: A BlobEvent instance with valid container_name, blob_name, sas_token, and blob_properties indicating a PDF file under 50MB.
output: A dict with 'success': True, including idempotency_key, routing, and confidence_result.
